channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Vaccine Alliance Responds to Kennedy's Concerns
item.description: Gavi informed the U.S. government it will accelerate its transition away from thimerosal-containing vaccines.

item.title: New Lawsuits Challenge Trump's $1.8 Billion Fund
item.description: Critics and former officials filed lawsuits Friday to block payments from the administration's $1.8 billion fund.

item.title: Mediators Race to Prevent Renewed Iran Attacks
item.description: Mediators worked Friday to preserve a framework for U.S.-Iran talks and prevent potential military action.

item.title: Congress Hesitates on $1.7 Billion Compensation Fund
item.description: Senate Republicans withdrew their border funding bill after backlash over a $1.776 billion fund created without congressional approval.
